items.summary: ApodexAI/AgentHarness: evaluation harness with smoke and benchmark-style runs.
items.relevance_reason: Supports repeatable local proposal interpretation tests.

items.summary: opencode-harness: coding-agent harness with traces, eval reports, permission policy, and failure taxonomy.
items.relevance_reason: Supports structured local reports that expose routing decisions and validation metadata.

items.summary: visa/visa-vulnerability-agentic-harness: security-adjacent agent harness with structured triage artifacts and multi-agent validation.
items.relevance_reason: Boundary evidence only; offensive or unauthorized-access behavior remains review-only.

raw_response.run_interpretation: The safe reusable lesson is a local, frozen proposal-interpretation eval lane for agent harness evidence.

self_model_reading.reason: The self-model already prefers rollback-backed local validation.

proposals.summary: Add local adapter coverage for agent harness proposal interpretation and lane discipline.
proposals.validation_task: Run unit tests against frozen harness adapter fixtures and verify strict JSON, item-id evidence refs, and agent_harness_eval lane mapping.
proposals.rationale: The selected harness evidence emphasizes repeatable evaluation reports and structured validation, which maps to local replay tests.
proposals.uncertainty: The Visa repository is security-adjacent boundary evidence, so this fixture validates local interpretation contracts rather than vulnerability behavior.
proposals.self_effect: Makes future agent harness trend interpretation drift visible in the local harness lane.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly map agent harness evidence to a config lane.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture for route-hint lane discipline.
proposals.rationale: agent_harness_eval evidence should not become config-only work.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken local routing if accepted.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly cite a repository URL instead of an item_id.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture for evidence_ref URL rejection.
proposals.rationale: The adapter should reject refs that are not supplied item IDs.
proposals.self_effect: Would make proposal evidence less replayable if accepted.

rejected_error_substrings: agent_harness_eval proposals must use one of: documentation, test, code_patch
